translated: These slight differences in the outfits...
They're amazing.
And the flowers are just gorgeous.
And next,
here is the untrained art.
Is this the actual studio where they film Eye Hazard?
The background with the camera, the exit sign in the back...
The lighting of the exit sign, and the monitor in the bottom right under the camera...
It's quite detailed.
It really captures what it's like to stand in a studio and look at the cameras.
I think Haruka-chan here
looks a bit nervous. This expression right before going live is so good.
Is that the camera?
But it really does look like this.
They're constantly filming you from all sorts of angles and with different expressions,
and then they switch between cameras to create the screen everyone usually sees.
So this is what it's like.
It's incredibly realistic.
And finally, we have MEIKO-chan.
MEIKO, you look so elegant!
This white... this white outfit is just stunning.
It suits her so well. That's our MEIKO.
She looks so mature and wonderful.
Holding the flowers too.
She's so cute. The way the sleeves flare out a bit is great.
So we've looked through them all. I wanted to write that the group name got cut off,
but because of the character limit, it just says "got cut off."
That happens sometimes.
Wait, what?
